Vegan ingredient guide

Learn Jamaican plant-based ingredients.

Explore local staples, cooking uses, meal ideas, and simple tips for building fresh vegan meals from the market.

Guide focus

Fresh, local, plant-based

Use this guide to plan meals, choose produce, and shop with more confidence.

Plant-based staples

Learn how Jamaican ingredients can support vegan cooking, meal prep, and family meals.

Cooking confidence

Each ingredient includes practical uses and a simple kitchen tip.

Shop connected

Use the guide as a companion to the marketplace when choosing fresh produce.

Ingredient guide

Vegan ingredient book

A premium educational guide for Jamaican plant-based ingredients, cooking ideas, and fresh market shopping.

Plant-based

Callaloo

Iron-rich greens for sautés, patties, wraps, breakfast bowls, and simple Jamaican-style sides.

BreakfastWrapsRice bowls

Tip

Cook lightly with onion, garlic, thyme, and a small amount of pepper.

Plant-based

Green banana

A hearty staple that works well boiled, mashed, sliced, or added to vegan meal prep bowls.

Boiled mealsMeal prepStews

Tip

Pair with callaloo, pumpkin, beans, or plant-based protein for a filling plate.

Plant-based

Breadfruit

Roast, bake, or air-fry for a premium plant-based centerpiece with a satisfying texture.

RoastingAir-fryingDinner plates

Tip

Serve with vegan sauce, fresh salad, or spicy roasted vegetables.

Plant-based

Scotch bonnet

A powerful Jamaican pepper used for authentic heat, fragrance, and depth of flavor.

SaucesStewsMarinades

Tip

Use sparingly. Add whole for flavor, or finely chop a tiny amount for heat.

Plant-based

Pumpkin

Excellent for soup, roasting, purees, stews, and creamy vegan sauces.

SoupsSaucesRoasting

Tip

Blend cooked pumpkin with garlic, herbs, and coconut milk for a rich vegan sauce.

Plant-based

Cho cho

Light, crisp, and mild, making it excellent for stews, salads, sautéed sides, and soups.

SaladsStewsSoups

Tip

Slice thinly for salads or add near the end of cooking to keep some texture.

Meal ideas

Simple vegan meal inspiration

Callaloo breakfast bowl with roasted breadfruit
Green banana and pumpkin stew
Cho cho salad with citrus dressing
Breadfruit wedges with spicy vegan dip
Pumpkin coconut soup with fresh herbs
Callaloo wraps with beans and sweet pepper
Kitchen tip

Build vegan meals around local staples.

Start with one filling base like green banana, breadfruit, yam, rice, or pumpkin. Add greens such as callaloo, then finish with herbs, citrus, beans, or a small amount of Scotch bonnet for flavor.

Shop ingredientsBuild weekly box

Guide note

This page is an educational shopping companion. Customers should still review product details, allergies, freshness, and preparation needs before purchasing or cooking.
